body: ## Purpose - Update snow flux convention so that negative implies towards land, positive implies towards atmosphere. - Update snowmip_simulation script to include a conservation check + use CairoMakie instead of Plots. Conservation plot shown below - Update prognostic variables to be snow water volume/energy per unit ground area, rather than per unit snow area. E.g. previously we had dS/dt = P_snow + (Evap - Melt)*Heaviside(S), All terms were per unit snow area. The total snow water in the cell would then be snow_cover_fraction * S. This led to poor conservation, since the actual thing we want to conserve is total water in the cell but the fluxes were changing water per snow area. - Now we have dSdt = P_snow + snow_cover_fraction * (Evap - Melt). Every term on each side is per unit ground area. In this case, S reflects the conserved quantity. ![conservation_cdp](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/e6df2938-35d9-4ebf-80ec-7042b48b3cd2) CLM: What is confusing to me is that they seem to also multiple q_ice [P_snow] by the snow cover fraction in one place (8.4,8.5), but not the other (8.12, 8.14). P_liq does get multiplied by the snow cover fraction; this makes sense. We currently do not let P_liq affect the snow since we dont model the energy in the liquid precip. That is a future fix. ## To-do Review ## Content As noted above. ---- - [ ] I have read and checked the items on the review checklist.
title: Change of snow prognostic variables
